summary.intent: Migrate a React Native/Expo app to Electron with file-based routing, and fix live checkpoint updates via WebSocket.
summary.outcome: Successfully migrated to Electron + Vite + React Router DOM, installed expo-router (then replaced it), fixed the WebSocket broadcast to watch CheckpointMetadata table, and resolved a git worktree stale reference issue.

repo: Project is at /Users/stephanostsoucas/gossamer with app/ (Electron renderer) and src/server.ts (API server)
API server runs on http://localhost:3000, WebSocket on ws://localhost:3000, broadcasts { type: 'sessions_updated' } to trigger UI refreshes
Server's 2s poller originally only watched the Event table — CheckpointMetadata inserts were silent, breaking live updates
Server supports --repo-dir flag for git-based checkpoint indexing via a worktree at /tmp/gossamer-checkpoints
The git worktree /tmp/gossamer-checkpoints gets cleared by macOS between restarts, causing non-fatal startup warnings
electron-vite outputs to out/ (out/main/index.js, out/preload/, out/renderer/) not dist-electron/

code.finding: WebSocket broadcast poller — was only watching Event table max id; fixed to also track CheckpointMetadata max id so new checkpoints trigger broadcasts
runIndex() was only called after 30s interval; fixed to also call immediately on server startup so checkpoints appear right away
Added git worktree prune logic on startup to handle stale /tmp/gossamer-checkpoints references
RN-to-web shim: View→div with flex-direction:column, Text→div, TouchableOpacity→div[role=button], StyleSheet.create is a passthrough. flatStyle() merges array styles.
Uses MemoryRouter (appropriate for Electron desktop) with 6 routes nested under Layout with Outlet

workflow: expo-router convention uses app/ for routes, which collides with an Expo project already rooted in app/ — use the root plugin option in app.json to rename
electron-vite build must complete before electron dev can run; package.json main field must match electron-vite output path (out/main/index.js)
When migrating RN to web, MarkdownView must be fully rewritten with semantic HTML because nested Text→div breaks inline text rendering
Navigation title management: pass title via navigate(path, { state: { title } }) and read it in Layout.tsx via useLocation().state.title

friction: expo-router naming collision with the project's own app/ directory required renaming the routes directory
electron-vite default output path (out/) didn't match initial package.json main field (dist-electron/main.js), causing Electron launch failure
tsconfig.json was auto-modified by Expo toolchain, stripping manually added include arrays
Background task failure notifications for earlier server runs (before main path fix) created noise during diagnosis
WebSocket live updates were silently broken after migration because server only watched Event table, not CheckpointMetadata — took API inspection to diagnose
git worktree at /tmp/gossamer-checkpoints gets wiped by macOS between reboots, causing non-fatal but noisy startup warnings
open_items: No web component library (Shadcn, Radix, MUI) has been added yet — the Electron migration was the prerequisite
primitives.tsx shim is a stopgap — screens could be refactored to use native HTML/CSS directly for better maintainability
CheckpointTimeline branch coloring uses a hash function — color palette and accessibility not reviewed
Server worktree prune fix was added but checkpoint indexing via --repo-dir path is still manually specified; no auto-discovery
SessionDetail.tsx uses useLocation().state.title for header — if navigated to directly (deep link), title will be missing
